claim: Modern continuous Hopfield networks with log-sum-exp energy function have exponential storage capacity in the network dimension.
mathematical_dependency: Ramsauer et al. 2020. log-sum-exp energy function E(xi) = -lse(beta * X^T * xi) + 0.5 * xi^T * xi + const. Exponential capacity follows from the structure of this energy function and fixed-point dynamics.
